title: Customize Gantt Timeline
excerpt: Please allow customization of gantt charts. We have fiscal year (crosses years) and academic year (three periods not four). Want to identify these as such.

posts.author: higheredpmo (Sandy Bury)
posts.cookedHtml: Please allow customization of gantt charts. We have fiscal year (crosses years) and academic year (three periods not four). Want to identify these as such.
